title: db2lin

arguments.description: minimum value (can be as low as "-Inf")

body: [db2lin] converts amplitude values from deciBel Full Scale (dBFS) to linear. By default, a minimum value of -100 becomes zero - in theory, zero is minus infinity and an argument sets another minimum dB value to correspond to minus infinity. Conversion expression is: amp = pow(10, dBFS / 20).
